packageRules.description: Group all non-major npm/bun bumps into one reviewable PR (mirrors the old Dependabot minor-and-patch group). Majors stay separate so breaking bumps (a new Next/React/TS major) get their own review.
Keep the GitHub Actions themselves current (checkout, setup-bun, gitleaks, etc.).

Hold TypeScript below 6.1 until typescript-eslint supports it. typescript-eslint (used via eslint-config-next) caps its peer at 'typescript <6.1.0' and crashes on the TS 7 native compiler, breaking `bun run lint`. Revisit when typescript-eslint ships TS 6/7 support.

Hold ESLint below 10 until the Next.js lint stack supports it. eslint-plugin-react (pulled in by eslint-config-next) has no ESLint 10 release and calls the removed context.getFilename() API, breaking `bun run lint`. Revisit when eslint-config-next / eslint-plugin-react ship ESLint 10 support.
